name: Ching Feng Home Fashions Co.,Ltd
summary: Ching Feng Home Fashions Co.,Ltd designs, develops, manufactures, and sells home decor products in Taiwan and internationally. It offers aluminum venetian, faux wood venetian, and vinyl venetian and vertical blinds; roman, pleated, and cellular shades; and coral fleece throws and blankets, flannel throws and blankets, faux fur throws, d√É¬©cor throws, and comforters. The company also provides decor pillows; and bath products, such as shower curtains and accessories. In addition, it offers beddings, table linens, cushions, and kitchen appliances. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Changhua, Taiwan.
